raw_response: \boxed{A} Based on the provided evidence, avelumab is listed as an immune checkpoint inhibitor that reduces T-cell inhibition via PD-1 pathway and has been specifically mentioned as having "shown improved overall survival" in clinical trials for metastatic urothelial (bladder) cancers.
